plist:
CFBundleExecutable 安装器 CFBundleIdentifier com.dongfangmei.installer CFBundleName 安装器 CFBundleDisplayName 东芳美诊所管理系统安装器 CFBundleVersion 1.2.0 CFBundlePackageType APPL LSMinimumSystemVersion 12.0 NSHighResolutionCapable
LSUIElement
cat > "安装器.app/Contents/MacOS/安装器" << 'RUNNER' #!/bin/bash # 安装器 — 自动解除隔离后运行 install.command MYDIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../.." && pwd)"
# 移除整个目录的隔离标记 xattr -rd com.apple.quarantine "$MYDIR" 2>/dev/null || true
# 运行安装脚本 INSTALL_SCRIPT="$MYDIR/install.command" if [ -f "$INSTALL_SCRIPT" ]; then chmod +x "$INSTALL_SCRIPT" # 如果是被 Gatekeeper 阻止，弹窗提示 if xattr "$INSTALL_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null | grep -q quarantine; then osascript -e 'display dialog "正在解除安全限制，请稍候..." buttons {"确定"} default button 1 with icon note' xattr -d com.apple.quarantine "$INSTALL_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null || true fi exec "$INSTALL_SCRIPT" else osascript -e 'display dialog "找不到 install.command 安装脚本\n\n请确认安装包文件完整" buttons {"退出"} default button 1 with icon stop' exit 1 fi RUNNER chmod +x "安装器.app/Contents/MacOS/安装器"
# Also copy the Clinic.app icon for the installer cp Clinic.app/Contents/Resources/AppIcon.icns "安装器.app/Contents/" 2>/dev/null || true
ls -la "安装器.app/Contents/MacOS/" echo "安装器.app created"
